topics.query_en: Relational algebra division operator database tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح عملية القسمة الجبر العلائقي قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Students struggle to conceptualize how the division operator finds entities that interact with all entities of a specific target set.

topics.topic_en: Relational Algebra: Joins and Cartesian Product
topics.topic_ar: الجبر العلائقي: الجداء الديكارتي وعمليات الربط
topics.query_en: Relational algebra joins and cartesian product explained
topics.query_ar: شرح الجداء الديكارتي والربط الجبر العلائقي
topics.reason: Differentiating between various types of joins (theta, natural, outer) and understanding how they filter a Cartesian product is mathematically complex.

topics.topic_ar: الجداول الافتراضية (Views) وقابليتها للتحديث في SQL
topics.query_en: SQL views explained updatable views tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح Views في SQL قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Understanding the abstraction of virtual tables and knowing the strict conditions under which a view can be updated requires deep knowledge of the underlying schema.

topics.topic_en: Relational Algebra: Set Operations and Union Compatibility
topics.topic_ar: الجبر العلائقي: عمليات المجموعات وشروط التوافق
topics.query_en: Relational algebra set operations union compatibility
topics.query_ar: عمليات المجموعات الجبر العلائقي قواعد بيانات
topics.reason: Applying set operations like union, intersection, and difference requires ensuring strict union compatibility (matching attribute counts and domains), which students frequently overlook.

topics.topic_en: Schema Modification and Constraint Handling in SQL
topics.topic_ar: تعديل المخطط والتعامل مع القيود في SQL
topics.query_en: SQL ALTER TABLE schema modification cascade restrict
topics.query_ar: تعديل الجداول ALTER TABLE والقيود قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Safely altering database schemas using CASCADE or RESTRICT without violating existing foreign key constraints or accidentally dropping data is practically challenging.
